description: The project consists of the structural renovation of the Westerfield Building and select renovations to the Hannah Chapel located on the campus of Rayne Memorial UMC in New Orleans. The work includes the reconfiguration of interior walls maintaining all major circulation elements including hallways. Mechanical, Electrical and Plumbing systems are being upgraded to support the new layouts and replace outdated equipment.

description: A Studio in the Woods is a collection of formal artist's residencies and education spaces under the Umbrella of Tulane University located on River Road in Lower Algiers. This permit is for a building named the Diboll Forest Workshop will be used by Tulane University as education space for their students. The building is a new two-story wood-framed building elevated on banded timber piles. FOUNDATION RELEASE ISSUED 4-24-2026
